title: Dangote: FG says Nigeria is greater than PENGASSAN - FinancialEDGE
description: The Federal Government on Monday berated the Petroleum and Natural Gas Senior Staff Association of Nigeria (PENGASSAN) for holding the whole country to ransom over a minor labour dispute that would have been amicably settled. The government said the $20 billion Dangote Petroleum Refinery is a national asset that must be supported to function and
html: The Federal Government on Monday berated the Petroleum and Natural Gas Senior Staff Association of Nigeria (PENGASSAN) for holding the whole country to ransom over a minor labour dispute that would have been amicably settled.
